_comment: Negative fixture for PRD-105-R5 — the index references a node id ("missing-page") for which no file exists at the substituted node_url_template path. PRD-600 fetches each node referenced in the index and MUST emit a gap when the fetch returns 404.

_expected_validator_finding.missing: index entry id="missing-page" has no corresponding node file at /act/n/missing-page.json (probe returned 404)
